metadata.description: The Lens, Manual Focus's working library of AI marketing skills for endurance-sport brands. Companion to the playbooks at manual-focus.co.uk/lens.

plugins.name: the-lens
plugins.description: 26 AI marketing skills: 24 workflow skills covering positioning, brand voice, naming, demand-gen, content systems, lifecycle, ops and personal-assistant work, a setup-the-lens onboarding orchestrator that welcomes new users and recommends a starter playbook, and a video-script-to-heygen utility that renders playbook explainer videos via the HeyGen API. Ask Claude to 'set up The Lens' after install.
